globalScan.message:
Are you sure you want to start scanning all Confluence spaces?

Existing data will be overwritten.

This operation may take some time.

selectedScan.message:
Are you sure you want to start scanning {{count}} selected space(s)?

Previous results will be overwritten.

purgeData.message:
Are you sure you want to permanently delete all Confluence scan data?

This action is irreversible. All scan results, PII detections, and checkpoints will be removed.

piiHelp.introduction: The badges indicate the number of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) detected, classified by severity level, as well as a global score:

high.title: Critical Severity (Red)
high.description: Counts the number of critical PII detected in the space.
high.types: Categories: Financial Data, Security, Sensitive Government IDs (e.g. Credit Card, Password, SSN).

medium.title: Medium Severity (Orange)
medium.description: Counts the number of medium severity PII detected.
medium.types: Categories: Official Documents, Medical Information, Personal IDs (e.g. Passport, Driver License, Date of Birth).

low.title: Low Severity (Blue)
low.description: Counts the number of low severity PII detected.
low.types: Categories: Contact Information, Location, Names (e.g. Email, Phone Number, IP Address).

score.title: Severity Score (Green)
score.description: Represents the total severity score for the space.
score.calculation: This score is the sum of critical, medium, and low counts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure detection engines, thresholds and types of information to detect

connection.title: Connection
connection.deploymentCloudDesc: Instances hosted by Atlassian (*.atlassian.net) — REST API v1, Basic Auth
connection.deploymentDataCenterDesc: Self-hosted instances — REST API v1, Bearer Token (PAT)

timeouts.title: Timeouts
timeouts.connectTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to establish a connection to the Confluence server (in milliseconds)
timeouts.readTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to receive a response from the Confluence server (in milliseconds)
timeouts.maxRetriesDesc: Maximum number of retry attempts on connection failure

pagination.title: Pagination
pagination.pagesLimitDesc: Number of Confluence pages fetched per API request
pagination.maxPagesDesc: Maximum number of pages to scan per Confluence space

placeholders.apiTokenExisting: Leave empty to keep current token

validation.baseUrlRequired: Base URL is required and must start with http:// or https://
validation.usernameEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.apiTokenRequired: API token is required for new connections

presidio.label: Presidio Detector
presidio.description: Microsoft's PII detection framework with pattern matching and NLP

regex.label: Regex Detector
regex.description: Pattern-based detection using regular expressions for structured data

ministral.label: Ministral-PII
ministral.description: Generative LLM detector (Ministral) that scans long documents in overlapping chunks. Complements the other detectors as an additional source (disabled by default).
ministral.chunkSizeHint: Number of tokens processed per chunk (256-4096). Larger chunks give more context but slower inference.
ministral.overlapHint: Number of tokens shared between consecutive chunks (0-512). Must stay smaller than the chunk size.
ministral.overlapError: Overlap must be smaller than the chunk size.

postfilter.label: Deterministic pre-filter
postfilter.description: Rejects values whose format is mechanically invalid (IP, MAC, IBAN).

threshold.label: Default Confidence Threshold
threshold.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) required for a detection to be reported. Lower values = more detections but potentially more false positives

validation.atLeastOneDetector: At least one detector must be enabled

piiTypes.title: PII Type Configurations
piiTypes.description: Configure detection settings for each specific type of Personally Identifiable Information. Enable/disable types and adjust confidence thresholds individually.

typeDescriptions.GOVERNMENT_ID: Identification number issued by a public authority
typeDescriptions.STREET_ADDRESS: Street and number of a postal address
typeDescriptions.SENSITIVE_DATE: Sensitive date linked to a person or record
typeDescriptions.EXPIRATION_DATE: Expiration date of a document or right
typeDescriptions.EMAIL: Email addresses in standard format (e.g., user@domain.com)
typeDescriptions.PHONE: Phone numbers in various international formats
typeDescriptions.TELEPHONENUM: Telephone numbers with country codes and extensions
typeDescriptions.SURNAME: Person's last name or family name
typeDescriptions.PERSONNAME: Generic person name (not split into first/last)
typeDescriptions.USERNAME: System user identifiers and account login names

typeDescriptions.CREDIT_CARD: Credit card numbers (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, etc.)

typeDescriptions.DRIVERLICENSENUM: Driver license numbers with state codes

typeDescriptions.PASSWORD: Account passwords, PIN codes and authentication credentials

typeDescriptions.DATE_TIME: Dates and times in various formats (ISO 8601, local formats, etc.)

typeDescriptions.DRUG: Names of medications, prescriptions and pharmaceutical substances
typeDescriptions.DOSE: Medical dosage information (quantity, frequency, route of administration)
typeDescriptions.BLOODTYPE: Blood types (A, B, AB, O with Rh factors +/-)
typeDescriptions.INJURY: Descriptions of injuries, traumas and bodily harm
typeDescriptions.MEDICALFACILITY: Names of hospitals, clinics and healthcare facilities
typeDescriptions.MEDICALCODE: Standardized medical codes (ICD, CPT, LOINC, etc.)
typeDescriptions.DOB: Person's date of birth in different formats
typeDescriptions.VEHICLEID: Vehicle identification numbers (VIN) and license plates

typeDescriptions.GENDER: Information about a person's gender or sex
typeDescriptions.MARITALSTATUS: Marital status (married, single, divorced, widowed, etc.)
typeDescriptions.LOCATIONZIP: Postal codes and ZIP codes for geographic location

typeDescriptions.SESSION_ID: Session identifier for web or app
